entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A technique using controlled environments to accelerate generation advancement in crops.

entities.name: CONTROLLED ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments where physiological parameters are altered to induce early flowering.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL FIELD-BASED GENERATION ADVANCEMENT METHODS
entities.description: Traditional methods of advancing crop generations in the field.

entities.name: LIGHT
entities.description: A physiological parameter altered in speed breeding to induce early flowering.

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: A physiological response induced by altered light to reduce generation time.

entities.name: GENERATION TIME
entities.description: The time taken for a crop to complete one generation.

entities.name: GERMINATING IMMATURE SEEDS
entities.description: A technique used to further reduce the generation time of crops.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A crop for which speed breeding protocols were standardized to allow six to seven generations per year.

entities.name: GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Advanced techniques integrated with speed breeding to boost genetic analysis.

entities.name: GENE EDITING
entities.description: Advanced techniques integrated with speed breeding to boost genetic analysis.

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: Advanced techniques integrated with speed breeding to boost genetic analysis.

entities.name: RAPID POPULATION DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Advanced techniques integrated with speed breeding to boost genetic analysis.

entities.name: GENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of genetic material to improve crop traits.

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a crop population over time.

entities.name: CULTIVAR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating new crop varieties.

entities.name: CROP PLANTS
entities.description: General term for plants grown for food or other uses.

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION DEMANDS
entities.description: Increasing global needs that drive the need for crop improvement.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop traits for better yield or quality.

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
entities.description: Technology integrated with speed breeding to add value to crop improvement programs.
